NATIONAL FOUNDATION FOR FACIAL RECONSTRUCTION INC
THE MICHAEL J FOX FOUNDATION FOR PARKINSONS

USAddress.AddressLine1Txt: JOSEPH A MARTINO HALL 45 COLUMBUS A

BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: GRIFFITHS PROFESSORSHIP FUND JOHNS HOPKINS CENTER FOR PSYCHEDELIC AND CONSC
NATIONAL FOUNDATION FOR FACIAL RECONSTRUCTION INC
THE MICHAEL J FOX FOUNDATION FOR PARKINSONS

ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.PurposeOfGrantTxt: SUPPORT THE EFFORTS TO BREAK THE CYCLE OF POVERTY IN NYC; ENGAGE IN ANY OTHER CHARITIABLE, RELIGIOUS, EDUCATIONAL, LITERARY AND SCIENTIFIC ACTIVITIES.
ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.AnyDiversionByGranteeTxt: ALL EXPENDITURES HAVE BEEN PURSUANT TO THE PURPOSE OF THE GRANT
ExpenditureResponsibilityGrp.ResultsOfVerificationTxt: EXPENDITURES WERE MADE TOWARDS ACHIEVING THE PURPOSE FOR WHICH THE GRANT WAS MADE.

LiquidationExplanationStmt.ExplanationTxt: THE GREAT FOUNDATION LIQUIDATED AND HAS TERMINATED OPERATIONS AS OF 12/31/2024. IN 2024, THE FOUNDATION HAD $90,567 OF CASH TO DISTRIBUTE. TO MEET A PRIOR YEAR COMMITMENT, THE FOUNDATION MADE A GRANT TO ANOTHER PRIVATE FOUNDATION PRACTICING EXPENDITURE RESPONSIBILITY IN THE AMOUNT OF $50,000 IN JUNE 2024. THEN, THE FOUNDATION MADE ALL ITS FINAL DISTRIBUTIONS TO QUALIFIED PUBLIC CHARITIES IN THE AMOUNT OF $40,567 ON 7/9/2024 AND ENTIRELY OF CASH. UPON DISTRIBUTING THIS CASH, THE FOUNDATION'S REMAINING ASSETS WERE ZERO, AS PRESENTED ON PART II OF THE FORM 990-PF. SEE DISSOLUTION STATEMENTS FOR A LISTING OF THE CHARITABLE DISTRIBUTION RECIPIENTS AND THE RESPECTIVE AMOUNTS OF CASH DISTRIBUTIONS TO EACH CHARITY.
